eventUrls.title: Event URLs
eventUrls.description: lu.ma event URLs to scrape (e.g. https://lu.ma/xxxxxx).

lumaCookie.title: Luma session cookie
lumaCookie.description: Cookie header string from a logged-in lu.ma session. Required to see guest lists. Format: 'name1=value1; name2=value2'.

scrapeGuests.title: Scrape guests
scrapeGuests.description: Attempt to extract the attendee/guest list (needs a valid cookie and an event that exposes it).

maxEvents.title: Max events
maxEvents.description: Safety cap on number of event pages to process.
